title: SQL: FOREIGN KEY constraints also apply to NULL values
poc:
CREATE TABLE "sys"."second" (
         "id"  int       NOT NULL,
         "ref" int,
         CONSTRAINT "second_id_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id"),
         CONSTRAINT "second_ref_fkey" FOREIGN KEY
 ("ref") REFERENCES "sys"."first" ("id")
 );
key_bug_features: FOREIGN KEY constraints incorrectly enforce NULL value checks
bug_features_seed:
CREATE TABLE "sys"."second" (
         "id"  int       NOT NULL,
         "ref" int,
         "data" float,
         CONSTRAINT "second_id_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id"),
         CONSTRAINT "second_ref_fkey" FOREIGN KEY
 ("ref") REFERENCES "sys"."first" ("id")
 );
